The Crazies (2010)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $39,123,589Details
International Box Office $17,321,945
Worldwide Box Office $56,445,534
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $12,165,372
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,951,429
Total $16,116,801
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A small town becomes a massive, hysteria-filled crime scene when, one by one, neighbors, friends, and family are possessed by homicidal behaviors.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,067,552 (41.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.43 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:69.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$19,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,477 opening theaters/2,479 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $59,305,215

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 26th, 2010 (Wide) by Overture Films
Video Release: June 29th, 2010 by Overture Films/Anchor Bay
MPA Rating: R for bloody violence and language
Running Time: 101 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Fugitive / On the Run, Weapons of Mass Destruction, Zombies
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Participant Media
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
